description_long: This ornate nightstand features a hexagonal top with a clock face design, complete with Roman numerals and two prominent clock hands. The body is supported by six intricately sculpted legs, each adorned with decorative flourishes and curved feet. The sides of the nightstand have oval glass or open panels framed by elaborate molding, allowing a view into the hollow interior. The finish is a muted gold or brass tone, giving the piece an antique, luxurious appearance. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some glass or open sections on the sides. The nightstand exudes a vintage, Victorian-inspired aesthetic, making it a striking accent piece in any urban or historical setting.
description: An ornate, hexagonal nightstand with a clock face top, gold-toned finish, and decorative sculpted legs. Features oval side panels and intricate detailing throughout.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the hexagonal clock face top, ornate legs, and two visible oval side panels.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the central oval panel, clock hands, and symmetrical leg arrangement.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the clock face, right-side oval panel, and detailed leg carvings.
description_view_3: Back-left view with a clear look at the rear oval panel and the ornate leg structure.
attribute_leg_design: ornate sculpted legs with curved feet
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or as an accent piece in a living area
